HOW TO ORDER
Simple 4-step process — get your tee in 5–7 days
1

Pick Your Design

Browse our collection above, find your favourite design and tap "Order Now" — or screenshot & send us on WhatsApp.

2

Select Size & Colour

Choose from S, M, L, XL, XXL. Available in Black & White. Mention your preference while ordering.

3

Make Payment

Pay ₹499 per T-shirt via UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) to our UPI ID below. Send screenshot as payment proof on WhatsApp.

4

Confirm & Receive

Share your full name, address & pincode on WhatsApp after payment. Your order ships within 24 hrs. Delivery in 5–7 days!
